problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
